title: Evangelion 20 Korean Release
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 Korean Release             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Dec 02, 2009 12:36 pm I'm not sure if someone already posted this already (I look and found nothing). The movie is getting released in Korea this month. Kim Song-ho has written a report for SciFi Japan that may interest EVA fans no matter where they live since it includes some general info plus some great artwork, courtesy of the Korean distributor for the film. http://www.scifijapan.com/articles/2009/11/30/evangelion-2-0-korean-release/

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Dec 02, 2009 12:44 pm so Korea definitively treats it's Eva fans better than the US chances of the continental states getting this kind of release?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Dec 02, 2009 1:21 pm I wish I would go their, but I don't have the time or money to go. The Premium pack looks awesome though.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Dec 02, 2009 2:58 pm EvaCub wrote: so Korea definitively treats it's Eva fans better than the US chances of the continental states getting this kind of release?

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Wed Dec 02, 2009 3:17 pm skikes wrote: EvaCub wrote: so Korea definitively treats it's Eva fans better than the US chances of the continental states getting this kind of release?

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Dec 02, 2009 4:42 pm Those were some nice screen caps. Makes me excited for a DVD release.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Dec 02, 2009 4:55 pm I wounder if anyone here lives in Korea or not?
